title: Student Lunch Special
body: Get 20% off any sushi roll with a valid student ID! Valid Mon-Fri, 11am-3pm.

title: New Seasonal Pastries!
body: Come try our new Lavender Lemon Scones and Honey Almond Croissants. They're delicious!

title: BOGO Bubble Tea
body: Buy one large milk tea, get one small fruit tea for FREE! This weekend only.

title: New Cardio Equipment Arrived
body: We've just installed 5 new treadmills and 3 ellipticals. Come check them out!

title: First Month 50% Off
body: Sign up for a dedicated desk this month and get your first month half off!

title: Fresh Strawberries are in!
body: Just received a huge shipment of organic strawberries from the local farm. Sweet and juicy!

title: Family Meal Deal
body: 4 Burgers, 4 Fries, and 4 Drinks for only $39.99! Perfect for a quick family dinner.

title: New Smoothie Menu
body: We've added 5 new high-protein smoothies to our menu. Try the Peanut Butter Power!

title: Now Offering Delivery
body: You can now order your favorite sushi rolls for delivery through our website!

title: Happy Hour Coffee
body: Buy any large coffee between 2pm and 4pm and get a second one for half price!

title: New Topping: Popping Boba!
body: We now have mango and strawberry popping boba. Add some burst of flavor to your tea!

title: Refer a Friend
body: Refer a friend and get one month of membership for FREE when they sign up!

title: Outdoor Seating Now Open
body: Enjoy your burger in the fresh air! Our patio is now open for the season.

title: First Grooming 20% Off
body: New clients get 20% off their first full grooming session. Book now!

title: Free Tire Pressure Check
body: Stop by anytime for a free tire pressure check and top-off. Stay safe on the road!

title: New Book Arrivals
body: We've just added over 50 new titles to our library. Come browse while you sip your latte.

title: Post-Workout Special
body: Show your gym check-in and get $2 off any smoothie! Valid daily.

title: Late Night Sushi
body: All rolls 30% off after 9pm! Dine-in only.

title: Live Music Saturday
body: Join us this Saturday at 7pm for live acoustic music from local artists.

title: Student Discount Daily
body: Students get 10% off their entire order every day with valid ID.
